mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(student_id, password, nickname, avatar, role, status, credit_score) VALUES(#{studentId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, #{creditScore})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
